what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that associates an attachment identifier with a board item target in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
It references a target via the URI board://item-8c7e2c43.
It records an added timestamp in ISO 8601 format with timezone.
standouts: The target is a board:// URI pointing to item-8c7e2c43.
The file is otherwise minimal and contains no explanatory text.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
References external board items with a board:// URI scheme.
concerns: There is no body or descriptive content beyond the metadata.
The board:// target is opaque without additional context.
No author or reason for the attachment is recorded.
notes: A sparse channel-attachment record that links att-2d7e7d1b to board item item-8c7e2c43 in dragnet-development, created on 2026-06-24.
questions: What content or state does board://item-8c7e2c43 represent?
Who created this attachment and why?
Is there a corresponding board item file or is this reference unresolved?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is a board_items attachment referencing a board item, which matches the metadata; it does not contain item content itself.
apparent_themes: Cross-referencing chat/channel attachments with board items
intention_signals: It appears intended to persist a discoverable, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a specific board item for later retrieval or traceability.
contribution: It contributes a persistent, timestamped pointer from a channel attachment to a board item, supporting link traversal between channel memory and board artifacts.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file named att-2d7e7d1b in dragnet-development that references board item board://item-8c7e2c43 and records an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to record an association between a channel attachment and a board item for retrieval and traceability.
